title: India’s Neighbourhood First policy needs a reboot
description: Outcomes of the Neighbourhood First policy are often mixed, shaped by actions on both sides. Recent engagements with Bangladesh, Myanmar, Sri Lanka, and Nepal suggest an opportune moment to recalibrate NFP, enhance its effectiveness, and bridge perceptions of India as an “elder brother” rather than a “big brother.” The post India’s Neighbourhood First policy needs a reboot appeared first on Gateway House.
